input_context.instructions:
Create macOS Accessibility CGO bindings. YOU MUST USE file_write TOOL CALLS to create files. Format: file_write("path/to/file", """content"""). Create these files:
1. internal/terminal/macos/accessibility.h - C header
2. internal/terminal/macos/accessibility.m - Objective-C implementation
3. internal/terminal/macos/accessibility_cgo.go - Go CGO wrapper (darwin build tag)
4. internal/terminal/macos/accessibility_stub.go - Stub for other platforms
5. internal/terminal/macos/accessibility_test.go - Tests
